default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Sunbit and GrowthX Labs to finalize a content strategy partnership focused on programmatic SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sunbit aims to increase site traffic and brand awareness, targeting a 5-10x growth](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs proposed a $12k/month programmatic SEO program for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Potential for $2.1M profit increase if Sunbit achieves 10x traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Focus on dental and automotive content clusters to compete with Care Credit](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

## Topics

### Current Situation and Goals

  - [Sunbit has 256 pages vs. Care Credit's 116,000](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Targeting 5-10x traffic growth could yield $2.1M additional profit](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Sunbit focusing on dental and automotive verticals](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Building foundational aspects for future branding initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX Labs recommends programmatic SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Aim to publish 120-150 pages per month](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Content to be hosted in Sunbit's WordPress "resources" section](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Strategy to leverage competitor (Care Credit) content for accelerated planning](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Budget and Timeline

  - [Sunbit CEO approved \~$90-100k budget](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Proposed $12k/month for 12 months, potentially starting April 7th](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Possibility of two-year agreement to lock in pricing](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Sunbit to achieve sustainable profitability in Q2, limiting current spend](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Technical and Legal Considerations

  - [No data transfer or PII access required by GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Preference for California or Delaware jurisdiction](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Sunbit's InfoSec team may have additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [CEO concerned about potential traffic manipulation (addressed by Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### Future Opportunities

  - [Sunbit planning larger branding budget post-funding round later in the year](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Potential for expanded scope and investment if initial program proves successful](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send amended SOW within 20-30 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/WaQ2rpzrQuzcdfBxHzGgge-MrxNAGxZi?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
